category_sources: source_facts.description says "CLI for organizing Tailwind CSS classes"; official README says RustyWind sorts Tailwind CSS classes and deletes duplicate classes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rustywind; official README heading uses RustyWind capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, usage, options, and behavior documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/avencera/rustywind, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
